Housekeeping and Ground Rules...
• We’re going to focus on Seed Launches... it’s a deep dive, and we have
to stay focused
• This won’t always be pretty, but it will be effective and it will be up-to-
date
• Calls will be recorded and posted in the members area
• My goal: be off the call in 90 minutes
• I’ll answer questions towards the end of the call
• I need you to participate - on the calls and between the calls
• Respect the ecosystem
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 50 --

Getting The Most From This Training
• You don’t have to be perfect, you just have to get started (baby steps)
• Two things that will hold you back (“I knew that” and “I disagree”)
• What to bring: open mind and open heart
• Fear
• Why this will work for you
• Why this won’t work for you

Modeling Jeff...
• FIRST: I have certain advantages (mostly my list and my knowledge)
• However, you can model almost all of what I’m doing
• I didn’t use a fancy launch - just two simple videos and a bunch of
basic off-the-shelf tools
• I’m delivering this as a Seed Launch, and I’m going to be very
transparent
• I surveyed you already, and will continue to do so (it makes for a
better experience for everyone)
• Please note that this isn’t a fancy powerpoint or a slick presentation
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 50 --

Module One - Your Seed List
• This module is all about getting your Seed List
• I’ve done Seed Launches with much smaller lists... but an initial list of
300 is a great number to aim at
• First I’m going to cover some list basics, then drill down into Seed
Lists, how to get the list, how to manage the list, and how to build a
relationship with your list
• If you already have a list...
www.getwsodownload.com

• Lists are your only true asset
• The REAL secret - list relationship
• The list I was born with...

30,000 foot level...

• Squeeze Page

-- 12 of 50 --

Ways to build your Seed List
• Current contacts
• Past clients
• Communities: Facebook, Google+, Linked In, Forums
• Publishing: your blog, social media (FB,Twitter, Linked In,YouTube)
• Public speaking
• Guest posts on popular blogs
• Host guest posts on your blog
• Interview experts
• Paid traffic (advertising... on FB, Linked In, other)
• Affiliates and Joint Ventures (generally not used in Seed Launches)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 50 --

The Squeeze Page
• 100% focused on getting the opt-in
• Not built for the search engines
• Can be on it’s own domain or on one of your current domains
• Tools: Optimize Press, Kajabi, or my absolute favorite...
• Leadpages.net
• What I’m currently using
• Created by “friend of PLF” Clay Collins
• Special bonus offer for Leadpages.net: BONUSES and LINK at end of
presentation!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 50 --

Critical Squeeze Page Wisdom
• Avoid video on your squeeze pages... it generally lowers response
• Have a good bribe (we’ll get to that)
• Curiosity is a huge win
• The headline and the bribe is what matters
• Any squeeze page is better than the almost-perfect page that isn’t up
yet
• Get version 1.0 up and then iterate.
• Test
• With Leadpages.net, there is no excuse
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 50 --

List Management

• Office Autopilot (OAP): more expensive, more capabilities
for very advanced list management. I just started testing
it.
• My OAP Link: http://www.sixinseven.com/OAP

-- 28 of 50 --

Great Squeeze Page Headlines
• Focus on results first:
• - To be more attractive, smarter, healthier, wealthier, productive, safer
or more secure, solve a problem
• Make an offer (i.e.,“They Laughed” doesn’t work,“Bad News” doesn’t
work)
• FREE: report, video, video series, ebook, training, download, app,
worksheet, blueprint
• Curiosity often works (depending on relationship)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 29 of 50 --

Squeeze Page Headline Formulas
• How to (SOLVE PROBLEM or ACHIEVE DREAM) without (NORMAL
UNDESIRABLE SOLUTION)
• Proven (X) Step Process to (SOLVE PROBLEM or ACHIEVE DREAM])
in (TIME FRAME or NUMBER OF STEPS) or Less
• Experiment with brackets - [FREE] or [DOWNLOAD] or [VIDEO]
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 30 of 50 --

Home (Hint: They All Weigh Less Than 5 Pounds)”

-- 32 of 50 --

Your Ethical Bribe
• This starts with understanding your avatar (your typical prospect)
• What are the biggest fears?
• What’s their biggest pain points? What keeps them awake at night?
• What are their biggest hopes, dreams, and aspirations?
• You will not solve all of those things with your bribe!
• But you want to be solving at least part of one of those problems or
helping them achieve part of their dream
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 33 of 50 --

What Bribes Work?
• Video Training
• Downloads (PDF ebooks, blueprints,
exercises, worksheets)
• Combination of video and PDF downloads
works very well
• Webinars
• The title is as important as the thing itself
• This doesn’t have to be complicated!! Test!!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 34 of 50 --

Getting Traffic to Your Squeeze Page
• Current contacts
• Past clients
• Communities: Facebook, Google+, Linked In, Forums
• Publishing: your blog, social media (FB,Twitter, Linked In,YouTube)
• Public speaking
• Paid traffic (advertising... on FB, Linked In, other)
• Affiliates and Joint Ventures (generally not used in Seed Launches)
• There is no one solution for everyone
• Everyone who has long term success uses multiple methods
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 35 of 50 --

Warming Your Cold List
• Almost EVERYONE has let a list go cold (by
not publishing to it)
• For every week or month a list goes unmailed,
it gets colder
• Fortunately, there is an easy solution...
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 36 of 50 --

How to Warm Your Cold List
• The mea culpa... reintroduce yourself and tell them why you haven’t
contacted them. It doesn’t have to be a great reason...
• Some revelation of self might not be a bad thing...
• Send them two or three pieces of cool content
• Possibly ask them to opt-in for some cool bonus content
• That’s it... it’s that simple
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 37 of 50 --

Care and Feeding of Your Seed List
• If you currently have a list, and want to do
a Seed Launch... consider having them opt-
in to a new list
• For example...
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 39 of 50 --

Care and Feeding of Your Seed List
• Revelation of self...
• Talk about their fears, hopes, dreams, aspirations, pains
• Raise and answer their objections (why it will work, why it will
work for them even if everything they’ve tried in the past has
failed)
• Your list doesn’t have to be big to get big results
• Your first subscribers will be your most responsive
• Always seek interaction (more on this in a later module)
www.getwsodownload.com
